name: Long-Grain and Wild Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in an air-tight container.
2. To prepare, bring 3 1/4 cups water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
3. Add the Rice Mix, cover, and simmer for 50 minutes.
4. Remove from heat and wait 10 minutes before fluffing with a fork.
Total calories per serving: 194
Fat: 1 gram
